<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\GenericLaravelExceptionSolutionProvider as BaseGenericLaravelExceptionSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class GenericLaravelExceptionSolutionProvider extends BaseGenericLaravelExceptionSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
